title: Best Buy Proves To Be A Big Winner, Having Survived Major Dynamic Shifts
text: Best Buy Co. is a leading American tech retailer, catering to consumers and end-users seeking a plethora of wide-ranging electronic and digital devices. A severe challenge the company faced was the rise of the e-commerce phenomenon, which it has faced head-on with its innovative strategic realignment, and proactive initiatives throughout the decade.

title: Best Buy: Overlooked Retailer Is A Buy
text: Best Buy is undervalued based on multiple valuation models. The company is growing organically and is the market leader in electronics.

title: Best Buy to launch home pick-up recycling service that includes appliances with laptops and smaller items
text: Best Buy Co. Inc. BBY, +2.24% said Wednesday it's launching a home pick-up recycling service and will come to customers' home to pick up old tech to be recycled, from laptops to bigger appliances such as washing machines. "Just a click away, anyone in the U.S. can now request pickup and recycling for old electronics, keeping tech, including appliances, out of landfills and giving it a second life," the company said in a statement.

title: Best Buy Launches Home Pick-Up Recycling Service
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Starting this month, Best Buy, the nation's largest retail collector of e-waste, is making it easier than ever to get rid of old tech while protecting the environment – by picking it up directly from customers' homes. Once picked up, all products are then responsibly and safely recycled. title: Best Buy's Stock Down 12% In A Month, What's Next?
text: After a 12% decline over the last month, at the current price of around $93 per share, we believe Best Buy's stock, an electronics specialty retailer - could see a rebound. BBY stock has declined from $105 to $93 in the last month, underperforming the broader indices, with the S&P growing almost 7%.
